action.content: Write a story about a family that goes camping in the woods. Your entire response should be in English and in all capital letters.
action.label: context

action.content:
THE FAMILY OF THIRTEEN ARRIVED AT THE OLD GLEN ON A BRIGHT SUMMER AFTERNOON. AFTER A LONG DAY OF WORK, THEY HAD DECIDED TO ESCAPE THE CITY AND FIND THE SILENCE OF THE FOREST. THE CAR RUMBLING ON THE BROAD, GRASSY ROAD, THEY HAD ARRIVED AT THE EDGE OF THE WOODS WHERE THE TREES TOUCHED THE SKY.

THEY SET UP THEIR TENT IN THE CENTER OF A LARGE CLEARING. THE MOTHER CHECKED THE WATER TANK AND THE COOKING STOVE, SURE THAT EVERYTHING WOULD BE READY FOR THE EVENING DINNER. THE FATHER, A MAN OF MANY EXPERIENCES, STARTED TO BUILD A FIRE IN THE CENTER OF THE CLEARING. THE FIRE RISED HIGH, CASTING SHADOWS OVER THE FAMILY AS THEY SAT ON THE GROUND.

THE CHILDREN WERE EXCITED. THE YOUNGEST ONE HAD A BASKET OF FRUITS AND A BOWL OF BREAD. THEY WERE READY TO TELL STORIES AND PLAY. THE MOTHER SPOKE OF THE FUTURE, TALKING ABOUT THE PLANTING GARDEN AND THE FARM THEY WOULD ONE DAY OWN. THE FATHER REMEMBERED THE DAYS WHEN THEY WERE KIDDING ABOUT THE BIGGEST STORM THEY HAD EVER SEEN.

AS THE SUN SET, THE SKY TURNED A DREAMY BLUE. THE FIRE WAS SLOWLY DOWNGRADED, AND THE FAMILY STARTED TO TALK ABOUT THE NIGHT. THE MOTHER SPOKE OF THE STARS AND THE MOON. THE FATHER REMEMBERED THE TIME WHEN THEY WERE KIDDING ABOUT THE BIGGEST STORM THEY HAD EVER SEEN. THE CHILDREN WERE EXCITED. THE YOUNGEST ONE HAD A BASKET OF FRUITS AND A BOWL OF BREAD. THEY WERE READY TO TELL STORIES AND PLAY.

THEY WERE ALL SOFTLY ASLEEP, THE FIRE STILL BURNING IN THE CENTER OF THE CLEARING. THE FAMILY REMEMBERED THE DAYS WHEN THEY WERE KIDDING ABOUT THE BIGGEST STORM THEY HAD EVER SEEN. THE MOTHER SPOKE OF THE FUTURE, TALKING ABOUT THE PLANTING GARDEN AND THE FARM THEY WOULD ONE DAY OWN. THE CHILDREN WERE EXCITED. THE YOUNGEST ONE HAD A BASKET OF FRUITS AND A BOWL OF BREAD. THEY WERE READY TO TELL STORIES AND PLAY.
action.label: response
